# sonarqube_qualityprofile_deactivated_rules (Data Source)

Use this data source to list deactivated rules on a Sonarqube quality profile.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sonarqube_qualityprofile_deactivated_rules" "example" {
  key = "my-quality-profile-key"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `key` (String) Quality Profile key. Can be obtained through api/qualityprofiles/search.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `rules` (List of Object) List of deactivated rules for the quality profile. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--rules))

<a id="nestedatt--rules"></a>
### Nested Schema for `rules`

Read-Only:

- `key` (String) Rule key.
- `language` (String) Rule language.
- `name` (String) Rule name.
- `repo` (String) Rule repository.
- `severity` (String) Rule severity.
- `status` (String) Rule status.
- `type` (String) Rule type.
